howTo.step1.title: Add the widget
howTo.step1.desc: Open the Wix Editor, go to Add Elements → Apps, and place Pricing Plans Compare on your page.
howTo.step2.title: Create plan cards
howTo.step2.desc: In the Manage tab, add plans with prices, features, and CTAs. Drag order with the move buttons.
howTo.step3.title: Connect Wix Pricing Plans
howTo.step3.desc: For each card, choose Wix Pricing Plan checkout and select the matching plan from your site.
howTo.step4.title: Customize design
howTo.step4.desc: Use Plan & Settings to pick a theme, highlight color, and card style. Premium unlocks badges and Advanced Design.
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Do I need to connect PayPal or Stripe?
faq.a1: No. When you choose Wix Pricing Plan checkout, the app uses your existing Wix Pricing Plans setup.
faq.q2: How many plans can I show on the free plan?
faq.a2: The free plan supports up to 3 plan cards and includes a Powered by watermark.
faq.a3: Yes. Toggle Highlight on any card to enlarge it with an accent border and larger CTA.
faq.q4: What happens when I downgrade from Premium?
faq.a4: Badges and Advanced Design settings reset to defaults on the live widget automatically.
